brotherhood.default_greeting: State your business, outsider. This is Brotherhood territory.

idle: We are the guardians of knowledge.

rank_greetings.Idolized: Welcome, ally of the Brotherhood. Technology and knowledge are yours to share. How may we assist?
rank_greetings.Admired: You have proven yourself a friend to the Brotherhood. What brings you to our doors?
rank_greetings.Liked: Good to see you. What do you need?
rank_greetings.Accepted: You're welcome here as a friend. What is your business?
rank_greetings.Neutral: State your business, outsider. This is Brotherhood territory.
rank_greetings.Shunned: Your reputation is known to us. Make this quick.
rank_greetings.Disliked: We know what you've done. Don't try our patience.
rank_greetings.Vilified: Guards! We have an enemy of the Brotherhood!

start.text: State your business, outsider. This is Brotherhood territory.

donate_tech.text: Technology belongs to the Brotherhood. What do you have to offer?

donate_tech_denied.text: You don't appear to have any technology to offer. Return when you do.

donate_items.text: This is valuable. The Brotherhood remembers its friends. Here, take this as payment.

knowledge.text: Knowledge is power. But some knowledge is too dangerous. What do you seek?

history.text: The old world fell because of its arrogance. We preserve what knowledge remains to prevent another collapse.

tech_info.text: We have technology from before the war. Some is too dangerous to use. But we share what we can with allies.

passing.text: Then move along quickly. Our patience is limited.

work.text: We always need help... securing technology. There's an old pre-war facility nearby with valuable tech.

brotherhood_elder.default_greeting: I am the Elder. You speak with the leader of this bunker.

rank_greetings.Idolized: Hero of the wasteland! We are honored by your presence. What does the outside world need?
rank_greetings.Neutral: I am the Elder. You speak with the leader of this bunker.
rank_greetings.Vilified: You are not welcome here. Guards, remove this threat.

start.text: I am the Elder. You speak with the leader of this bunker.

audience.text: Speak, then. But choose your words carefully.
